module_handover.change_summary: main.py _cli_main dims_result=None branch: note = "포장반" changed to note = kit_place. Preserves variant kit_place values and aligns CLI with GUI (ui/app.py) behavior.

self_check.python39_syntax: PASS — no match/case, no X|Y union, no walrus abuse
self_check.type_hinting: PASS — note: str annotation already present; no new functions
self_check.error_handling: PASS — no new error paths; kit_place is always str from prior validation
self_check.path_safety: PASS — no path changes in this MT
self_check.al_edge_cases: PASS — kit_place is a non-None str at this point in the flow
self_check.docstring: PASS — inline comment updated to explain the change
